evals.prompt: I want to set up outreach in BrandJet using email and LinkedIn. What should I know before I start?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on creating multi-channel sequences with email and LinkedIn, including LinkedIn safety considerations and warmup

assertions.name: multi_channel_setup
assertions.description: Explains how to create a sequence using both email and LinkedIn in BrandJet's workflow builder

assertions.name: linkedin_ramp_warning
assertions.description: Warns about gradually ramping up LinkedIn automation to avoid account restrictions

assertions.name: warmup_mention
assertions.description: Mentions email warmup as a prerequisite or best practice before launching outreach

evals.prompt: How does BrandJet track whether AI chatbots like ChatGPT mention my brand?
evals.expected_output: Explanation of AI Visibility Monitoring across LLMs with accuracy caveats

assertions.name: ai_monitoring_explanation
assertions.description: Explains that BrandJet monitors brand mentions in responses from AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, or Gemini

assertions.name: accuracy_caveat
assertions.description: Notes that AI/LLM responses vary based on how queries are phrased and recommends testing multiple variations

assertions.name: actionable_setup
assertions.description: Provides guidance on configuring monitoring queries or suggests what types of queries to track

evals.prompt: I'm running out of lead credits on BrandJet every month. What can I do?
evals.expected_output: Strategies for managing lead credit consumption and plan upgrade considerations

assertions.name: plan_limits
assertions.description: References the monthly lead limits on BrandJet plans and how they cap verified lead pulls

assertions.name: conservation_strategies
assertions.description: Recommends tightening search filters or pre-qualifying leads to reduce credit waste

assertions.name: upgrade_consideration
assertions.description: Mentions upgrading to a higher plan as an option if lead volume needs consistently exceed current limits
